name: Mpho Lekunya
text: Joining RFI transformed my walk with God. The teaching is deep, the community is loving, and I have grown more in the past two years here than I had in the previous ten. I am grateful for this family.

name: Thabiso Mokoena
text: RFI gave me a purpose and a platform. Through the Youth Ministry I discovered my calling to lead and serve. The mentorship I have received here is priceless – I am a better man, father, and leader because of this church.

name: Nthabiseng Phiri
text: The Women's Ministry at RFI is truly a safe space. I came broken and found sisters who prayed with me, supported me, and showed me the love of Christ in action. God used this church to restore my family.

name: David Molapo
text: As a new believer I did not know what to expect from church. RFI welcomed me, discipled me, and helped me understand what it means to be a man of God. Every new member should experience what I experienced here.
